sections.paragraph:
Original: בּרד

Transliteration: bered

Phonetic: beh'red

BDB Definition:

Bered = "hail"
  1. a son or descendant of Ephraim (noun proper masculine)
  2. a place in the south of Palestine, near Kadesh, near the well Lahairoi (noun proper locative)

Origin: from H1258

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
